widget.errorHint: Click to retry — open settings for fix steps

panel.title: Dictation
panel.emptyHint: Click the mic icon in the bar to start

settings.title: Dictation Settings

hotkeys.title: Keyboard shortcuts
hotkeys.desc: Dictation does not register global hotkeys itself. Bind the IPC commands below in your compositor (Niri, Hyprland, etc.). The bar mic button always toggles recording.
hotkeys.stopHintDesc: Optional label shown on the live overlay (e.g. Super+Shift+D). Leave empty to show the IPC stop command.
hotkeys.genericExampleDesc: Bind this command in your compositor's keybind config:

settings.showPartialDesc: Italic preview text from the streaming pass
settings.overlayPositionDesc: Where the transcript card appears on screen
settings.autoTypeDesc: Type each phrase into the focused window via wtype (off = clipboard only on stop)
settings.vadEnabledDesc: Silero VAD skips decode on non-speech audio
settings.vadThresholdDesc: Higher = stricter (less background noise). Restart backend after change.
settings.engineDesc: sherpa-onnx two-pass streaming with Silero VAD noise gating (Zipformer live + Whisper/SenseVoice finals).
settings.sherpaProfileDesc: English uses Zipformer+Whisper. Multilingual adds SenseVoice for better non-English accuracy.
settings.downloadModelsDesc: Run download_models.sh english (or multilingual) once after install. English ~150 MB; multilingual ~700 MB. Includes Silero VAD (~200 KB).
settings.languageDesc: Auto-detect or pick a specific language
settings.timeoutDesc: Optional max seconds (0 = unlimited). Sessions stop via hotkey or mic click.

deps.title: Installation checks
deps.desc: Verify Python packages, speech models, and typing tools before dictating.
deps.notRun: Click Verify installation to run checks.
deps.fixNeeded: Fix the items above, then verify again

errors.backendTimeout: Backend failed to start (timeout). Open plugin settings → Verify installation.
errors.backendRetries: Backend failed after 3 retries. Open plugin settings → Verify installation.
errors.backendExited: Backend exited unexpectedly. Check plugin settings → Logs, then Verify installation.
